response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via open-source GIS platforms, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation pipelines, and his work with DLang and Node.js doesn't fully align with the role’s core requirement of high-performance C++ for routing tiling.
strengths: Proven experience building geospatial platforms (GISCollective, Open Green Map) with real-world usage
Strong track record in distributed systems, low-latency apps, and DevOps infrastructure
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tile processing contexts
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the required C++ for routing data pipelines
Limited evidence of fault tolerance, consistency, or distributed systems in geospatial data contexts
